title: OASIS Floral Foam Brick | Florist Foam | Flower Foam Block for Crafts (Pack of 1)
features: Efficient Water Absorption: OASIS Floral Foam is designed to efficiently absorb water, providing a reliable water source for your fresh flowers, ensuring their longevity and vibrancy.
Secure Stem Placement: With its ideal density, OASIS Floral Foam bricks securely hold flower stems in place, allowing you to create beautiful arrangements and floral structures with ease.

Convenient Size and Packaging: Each OASIS Floral Foam brick is individually shrink-wrapped and measures L:23 x W:11 x H:7.5cm, making it convenient to store and use. Cutting lines are provided to help divide the brick into thirds for customised arrangements.

Enhanced Flower Life: Featuring a unique cell structure and Maxlife technology, OASIS Floral Foam supports excellent flower life by promoting efficient water uptake and maintaining balanced pH levels, ensuring your blooms stay fresh for longer.
Quality UK Manufacturing: Proudly made in the UK, OASIS Floral Foam is crafted to the highest standards, offering reliability and performance for all your floral design needs.
